jobTitle: Director of Product Management - Trust & Safety
jobDescription: Roblox is ushering in the next generation of entertainment, allowing people to imagine, create, and play together in immersive, user-generated worlds. We’re the one and only fastest-growing entertainment platform that lets anyone teach themselves how to code, publish, and monetize any experience imaginable—across any device—reaching millions of players across the globe. The impact that you can have at Roblox is powerful. We’re looking for someone who’s eager to take on a meaningful role in the success of Roblox on a massive scale. Someone who takes play seriously, but also isn’t afraid to have some fun either. Someone who’s ready to take Roblox—and their career—to the next level. In 2018, we were honored to be recognized as a Certified Great Place to Work®. We’ve fostered a company culture that empowers people to do the most defining work of their career in an environment that’s made up of the most passionate, team-oriented, visionary, crazy-smart people you’ll ever meet. Join the Roblox team where play rules and the possibilities are endless. As Director of Product Management, Trust & Safety, you will responsible for leading teams that will teach and empower a generation that embraces civility and ensure Roblox remains a safe place for all ages to create, socialize, and share in play and immersive entertainment.  You will work closely with engineering teams responsible for defining player reputation systems, building features governing safety and parental oversight, compliance with COPPA, GDPR and other laws. You Are: A product leader who drives the ideation, specifications, prioritization, development and success metrics of innovative product features Knowledgeable with 8+ years of product management  An industry expert with 5+ years driving product-focused Trust & Safety initiatives at an online marketplace, social network, or other relevant product with millions of users Familiar with risk frameworks and the latest innovations in identity technology Experienced assessing, negotiating, implementing, and managing external vendor relationships; direct experience with different identity and fraud vendors a plus A Seasoned professional with a solid understanding of MMO trends, or very similar environments Exceptional in organizational and analytical skills with strong technical abilities Very comfortable with SQL, Google Analytics, Tableau or other data visualization tools Data driven with a strong grasp of methods to track the performance and impact of the features you are developing including A/ B tests and usability testing A product champion and inspiration to the people around you, as you thrive in an entrepreneurial and fast paced environment with competing resources and priorities Have a Degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Economics or a related technical field or equivalent practical experience You will: Consistently drive product development to meet our high standards of usability, quality, presentation  Help develop a long term strategy and roadmap for the team and product Discover and define the improvements, problems and solutions we should be pursuing Tackle creative challenges that have never been solved before; design and author product specs that will guide your team to victory Direct the team through the product backlog and author stories with clear definitions Manage development in a constantly evolving environment where the process is fluid and creative solutions are the norm Develop and track key metrics for feature performance, gain insight from the resulting data, drive improvements over time and communicate their status Champion and demonstrate new features and improvements to key stakeholders and teams across the company Proactively support the needs of the Roblox player and developer communities Expand the risk framework to address ever-changing trust and safety needs for Roblox’s platform Define and execute an associated roadmap of features, tools, and initiatives to improve trust and reduce risk Collaborate cross-functionally with Operations, Engineering, Data Science, Legal, and PR to enable prevention and mitigation of trust and safety incidents You'll Love: Excellent medical, dental, and vision coverage A rewarding 401k program Flexible vacation policy Free catered lunches five times a week and several fully stocked kitchens with unlimited snacks Onsite fitness center and fitness program credit Annual Cal Train Go Pass A Roblox Admin badge for your avatar Roblox – Powering Imagination
